title: Malaysian Semolina Fritters
description: A sweet and crispy dessert inspired by Malaysian cuisine. Crunchy on the outside, gooey on the inside.
instructions: Combine semolina, peppery, and honey in a large bowl.
Gradually add water, stirring until a thick batter forms.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the batter into the hot oil.
Fry for 3-4 minutes, or until golden brown and puffed up.
Using a slotted spoon, remove fritters from the oil and drain on paper towels.
